'''âsh-k-n-j''' ('''kashaknejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telegramme|telegramme]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-n-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telegramme|telegramme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-k-n-j
|-
! Lemma
| kashaknejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishaknejoko|thishaknejoko]] || [[word:jishaknejoko|jishaknejoko]] || [[word:shishaknejoko|shishaknejoko]] || [[word:kishaknejoko|kishaknejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushaknejoko|thuthushaknejoko]] || [[word:jujushaknejoko|jujushaknejoko]] || [[word:shushushaknejoko|shushushaknejoko]] || [[word:kukushaknejoko|kukushaknejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushaknejoko|thushaknejoko]] || [[word:jushaknejoko|jushaknejoko]] || [[word:shushaknejoko|shushaknejoko]] || [[word:kushaknejoko|kushaknejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushaknejoko|thushaknejoko]] || [[word:jushaknejoko|jushaknejoko]] || [[word:shushaknejoko|shushaknejoko]] || [[word:kushaknejoko|kushaknejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshaknejoko|thothoshaknejoko]] || [[word:jojoshaknejoko|jojoshaknejoko]] || [[word:shoshoshaknejoko|shoshoshaknejoko]] || [[word:kokoshaknejoko|kokoshaknejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshaknejoko|thoshaknejoko]] || [[word:joshaknejoko|joshaknejoko]] || [[word:shoshaknejoko|shoshaknejoko]] || [[word:koshaknejoko|koshaknejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshaknejoko|thoshaknejoko]] || [[word:joshaknejoko|joshaknejoko]] || [[word:shoshaknejoko|shoshaknejoko]] || [[word:koshaknejoko|koshaknejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshaknejoko|thĂŠshaknejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshaknejoko|jĂŠshaknejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshaknejoko|shĂŠshaknejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshaknejoko|kĂŠshaknejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashaknejoko|thathashaknejoko]] || [[word:jajashaknejoko|jajashaknejoko]] || [[word:shashashaknejoko|shashashaknejoko]] || [[word:kakashaknejoko|kakashaknejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashaknejoko|thashaknejoko]] || [[word:jashaknejoko|jashaknejoko]] || [[word:shashaknejoko|shashaknejoko]] || [[word:kashaknejoko|kashaknejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashaknejoko|thashaknejoko]] || [[word:jashaknejoko|jashaknejoko]] || [[word:shashaknejoko|shashaknejoko]] || [[word:kashaknejoko|kashaknejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
